# PHIL.096 ? Philosophy of Technology

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** specialized_interdisciplinary
**Subcategory:** philosophy_of_technology
**Domain:** SPECIALIZED_INTERDISCIPLINARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Technology's impact on humanity; mediation; instrumental vs substantive views; technological determinism; ethics of technology

## Application
Examine technological mediation; human-technology relation; technological shaping; ethical assessment; critical technology studies

## Key Values
- Technology critique
- Mediation
- Human impact
- Ethical assessment

philosophy, specialized-interdisciplinary, philosophy-of-technology
